message: Jake
Kristy
Günter
When I think about making materials for the conference now that I have some time, you show up, don’t you?
It's not like I'm consciously aware of you.
I also don't think I could do that consciously.
Oh, it's you again.
You come here often, don't you?
I don't think I have anything else to talk about, though.

A room that's so clean not a single hair is out of place. Is that the scent of phenol disinfectant used in hospitals that faintly drifts here?
However, this is not a hospital in the true sense.
A hospital
is not.
It might be that you're overly fastidious.
A simple and hygienic room fitting for a doctor's office.
No, in Günter's case, should I say it's a room good for mental health?
Most of the books occupying the wall shelves seem to be medical texts.
You're quite diligent in your studies.
I've never seen you smile, but today you seem particularly clouded in expression.
He's always calm and doesn't make mistakes.
He probably wouldn't let the death of an acquaintance disturb him too much.
In his usual suit and tie, with thick glasses.
Seeing him somehow makes me feel relieved.
What's wrong? You don't look well.
It's just that I've been under a lot of stress.
Like what, for example?
A person who was killed by an acquaintance.
Several in a short period.
So I'm feeling a bit worn out.
I see.
In that case, maybe it's better not to talk about that matter.
That matter? What exactly are you referring to?
Well, um,
I think it would be better to discuss it when you’re calm.
If you start to say something and then keep it a secret, it'll just add to my worries. Please tell me.
Indeed, you have a point.
You shouldn't overburden yourself either. After all, no matter how hard we try, what one person can do is quite limited.
Again,
it's about her, right?
You're exactly right.
As I predicted, she is quite dangerous. There’s a possibility she might be involved in harming people.
Please don't talk so recklessly. Not when it comes to her.
That's impossible.
Even if not now, if we look back at the past,
well, it’s still entirely possible even now.
Even if you say that, what do you want me to do?
What am I supposed to do?
I'm not telling you what to do. I just want you to keep an eye on her.
Of course, that's a tough ask for you right now. You might feel overwhelmed if you focus more on others than on yourself.
I'm sorry to add to your troubles,
but anyway, don't forget about Miss Dern; she's dangerous.
Is something wrong again?
Or rather, it just means they haven't gotten better.
That person could kill someone, right?
That can't be true, can it?
When I'm this tired,
I feel like I want to get counseling to feel better.
Still,
are they unable to shake off the thought of that person committing murder?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
